title: ConnectorStatus
description: Local connector profile record for the GAIL OS connector registry. Not credentials; not a live adapter. Planning-only at current A1 boundary.

SystemFamily.description: High-level system family this connector belongs to.

ConnectorCurrentState.description: Current operational state of the connector. All connectors are planning-only at A1.

owner.description: Human or team that owns this connector profile.

tenant_or_workspace.description: Tenant, organization, or workspace this connector targets.

prohibited_capabilities.description: Capabilities explicitly blocked under current governance.

data_classes.description: Data classification levels this connector is permitted to handle.

approval_gate.description: What approval is required before elevating this connector.

retention_rule.description: Data retention rule for records produced by this connector.

audit_requirements.description: Required audit fields for any operation through this connector.

stop_triggers.description: Action types that trigger an automatic stop when attempted through this connector.

failure_behavior.description: What the system does if this connector fails.

live_access_enabled.description: Whether live access is enabled. Must be false at A1 boundary.
